mechanism_narrative: A sustained federal funds rate below 0.25% anchors discount rates at low levels, increasing the present value of future corporate cash flows and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 55% of observations when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate above 9.5% signals excess labor slack that depresses wage growth and consumer spending expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of months when UNRATE exceeds 9.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month expansion in real retail sales and industrial production indicates broad-based final demand strength that reduces recession risk and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between RSAFS and INDPRO produces a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is below 1%, a rising consumer price index reflects successful demand reflation that supports nominal revenue growth and equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: During periods with FEDFUNDS below 1%, month-over-month CPI increases are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in fewer than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production signals contracting manufacturing activity and falling corporate profitability, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances when INDPRO is declining month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts signal strengthening construction activity and downstream demand for materials, labor, and credit, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in fewer than 55% of observations during periods of rising housing starts.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in nonfarm payrolls signals weakening aggregate income growth and compression in consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of triggered instances when nonfarm payrolls decline.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in retail sales and a declining unemployment rate signal robust consumer demand without labor market bottlenecks, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal from RSAFS and UNRATE produces a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
